mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT paper_performance FROM hot_stamping_compatibility ORDER BY paper_performance

SELECT DISTINCT pattern_characteristic_id FROM hot_stamping_compatibility WHERE product_type_id = #{productTypeId} AND pattern_characteristic_id IS NOT NULL AND compatibility IN ('V', '▷') ORDER BY pattern_characteristic_id

SELECT hsc.id, hsc.paper_performance, hsc.product_type, hsc.pattern_characteristic, hsc.hot_stamping_type, hsc.compatibility, hpb.pattern_type, hpb.line_thickness_min, hpb.line_thickness_max, hpb.solid_area_min, hpb.solid_area_max, hsc.created_at, hsc.updated_at, hsc.product_type_id, hsc.pattern_characteristic_id, hsc.hot_stamping_type_id, hsc.pre_processing_step_id, hsc.post_processing_step_id, hsc.notice_ids, -- 关联表信息（别名与 resultMap column 一致，便于 MyBatis 正确映射） pto.product_name AS product_type_name, hpb.option_name AS pattern_characteristic_name, CASE WHEN hto.position_type IS NULL THEN hto.stamping_type ELSE hto.stamping_type || '-' || hto.position_type END AS hot_stamping_type_name, pso.pre_processing_steps_name AS pre_processing_step_name, NULL::text AS post_processing_step_name, -- 关联表描述信息 pto.description AS product_type_description, NULL::text AS pattern_type_description, hto.description AS hot_stamping_type_description, pso.description AS pre_processing_step_description, NULL::text AS post_processing_step_description, -- 状态信息 pto.is_active AS is_active, pto.display_order AS sort_order FROM hot_stamping_compatibility hsc LEFT JOIN product_type_options pto ON hsc.product_type_id = pto.id LEFT JOIN hot_stamping_pattern_base hpb ON hsc.pattern_characteristic_id = hpb.id LEFT JOIN hot_stamping_type_options hto ON hsc.hot_stamping_type_id = hto.id LEFT JOIN pre_processing_steps_options pso ON hsc.pre_processing_step_id = pso.id ORDER BY hsc.paper_performance ASC, hsc.product_type_id ASC NULLS LAST, hsc.pattern_characteristic_id ASC NULLS LAST, hsc.hot_stamping_type_id ASC NULLS LAST, hsc.id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT product_type FROM hot_stamping_compatibility ORDER BY product_type
SELECT DISTINCT hot_stamping_type FROM hot_stamping_compatibility ORDER BY hot_stamping_type

SELECT stamping_type as stampingType, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 1 AND MAX(position_type) IS NULL THEN true ELSE false END as isDefault, NULL as options FROM hot_stamping_type_options WHERE is_active = true GROUP BY stamping_type ORDER BY MIN(sort_order)

SELECT id, stamping_type as stampingType, position_type as positionType, description, is_active as isActive, sort_order as sortOrder, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM hot_stamping_type_options WHERE is_active = true AND stamping_type = #{stampingType} ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT id, paper_performance, product_type, pattern_characteristic, hot_stamping_type, compatibility, pre_processing_step_id, product_type_id, pattern_characteristic_id, hot_stamping_type_id, post_processing_step_id, notice_ids, created_at, updated_at FROM hot_stamping_compatibility WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hot_stamping_compatibility ( product_type_id, pattern_characteristic_id, hot_stamping_type_id, pre_processing_step_id, post_processing_step_id, product_type, pattern_characteristic, hot_stamping_type, compatibility, paper_performance, notice_ids, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productTypeId}, #{patternCharacteristicId}, #{hotStampingTypeId}, #{preProcessingStepId}, #{postProcessingStepId}, #{productType}, #{patternCharacteristic}, #{hotStampingType}, #{compatibility}, #{paperPerformance}, #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler},
#{createdAt} NOW() ,
#{updatedAt} NOW()
)
mapper.update:
UPDATE hot_stamping_compatibility SET product_type_id = #{productTypeId}, pattern_characteristic_id = #{patternCharacteristicId}, hot_stamping_type_id = #{hotStampingTypeId}, pre_processing_step_id = #{preProcessingStepId}, post_processing_step_id = #{postProcessingStepId}, product_type = #{productType}, pattern_characteristic = #{patternCharacteristic}, hot_stamping_type = #{hotStampingType}, compatibility = #{compatibility}, paper_performance = #{paperPerformance}, notice_ids = #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE hot_stamping_compatibility SET notice_ids = #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
